arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Kendra experience, which uniquely identifies it.

configuration.description: The configuration settings of the Kendra experience, including content sources and user identity settings.

created_at.description: The date and time when the Kendra experience was created.

description.description: A brief description of the Kendra experience.

endpoints.description: A set of endpoints for accessing the Kendra experience, including their types.

error_message.description: The error message, if any, associated with the Kendra experience.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Kendra experience.

name.description: The name of the Kendra experience.

role_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM role associated with the Kendra experience.

status.description: The current status of the Kendra experience.

updated_at.description: The date and time when the Kendra experience was last updated.
